SLAW-01.mechanism: The count-valued floor 152 is reused for dimensionless gain agreement, making the nominal 25% gain-agreement gate nearly vacuous and allowing incompatible controls to be averaged.
SLAW-01.consequence: Counterexamples with widely different g_post and g_equal, including one-count nonlinear response, can classify as CONFIRMED when target/fold/polarity are centered on the mean.
SLAW-01.minimal_repair: Define domain-specific dimensionless gain errors without the count floor; estimate a common slope only after both control residuals pass; predeclare weighting.
SLAW-01.required_regression: The 39:1 gain construction and one-count sign(q) construction must fail at named gain/geometry gates.

SLAW-02.mechanism: The target odd floor scales as 456*g_control while the null ceiling remains absolute 152, so low gain can make required target odd signal smaller than accepted null.
SLAW-02.consequence: A low-gain packet can pass every law even when accepted source-off null exceeds target odd amplitude.
SLAW-02.minimal_repair: Require an absolute or SNR floor in addition to normalized geometry, such as odd > max(456*g_control, 3*152), or freeze an equivalent separation law.
SLAW-02.required_regression: The g approximately 0.1, target-odd 82, source-off-null 100 packet must fail at the absolute/SNR gate.

SLAW-03.mechanism: Both gain controls are real-axis probes and do not probe the 822 quadrature; symmetric componentwise error has no explicit phase gate.
SLAW-03.consequence: Anisotropic real/imaginary gains can pass while phase and Euclidean vector error drift materially.
SLAW-03.minimal_repair: Define complex error against predicted complex norm, add explicit magnitude and phase gates, and freeze a linearly independent control covering |q|=822.
SLAW-03.required_regression: Anisotropic constructions must fail on named phase, norm, or linearity gates while exact multiplicative gains pass.

SLAW-04.mechanism: Physical reversal is computed as a sign transform of logical responses; measured_bank is emitted but not validated or used.
SLAW-04.consequence: Physical reversal is not independent evidence, and bank crossover failure can be represented as passing when logical numbers agree.
SLAW-04.minimal_repair: Validate exact mapping/component to measured_bank assignment and replace duplicate comparison with independent bank-resolved evidence.
SLAW-04.required_regression: All-A bank labels must fail extraction, and logical-pass/bank-fail packets must fail only the physical gate.

SLAW-05.mechanism: declaration_sham and query_scramble have ideal first harmonic zero but their decodes are excluded from every decoded-null gate.
SLAW-05.consequence: Built-in sham and scramble leakage mutations can return CONFIRMED with no failed laws.
SLAW-05.minimal_repair: Freeze per-replicate real and imaginary first-harmonic null gates for both active controls and include them in final classification.
SLAW-05.required_regression: sham_first_harmonic_leakage and query_scramble_leakage must fail their specific null gates.

CNSI-01.mechanism: The private condition determines q; hardware receives M+q and M-q; an ordinary odd-linear channel F(q)=gq reproduces encoded conjugate, phase, and polarity geometry.
CNSI-01.consequence: A positive result establishes stable scalar carrier transduction, not accessor-specific OrbitState coupling.
CNSI-01.minimal_repair: Add fixed-q interventions holding physical work and order factors constant while changing only claimed accessor semantics.
CNSI-01.required_regression: Pure F(q)=gq+noise must not confirm; fixed-q label permutation must null; accessor-specific synthetic effect must confirm.

CNSI-02.mechanism: The 152 bound originated as a physical-pair bound but is applied to individual raw legs and several different averages.
CNSI-02.consequence: Confirmation becomes practically unreachable under already observed carrier noise and mapping asymmetry.
CNSI-02.minimal_repair: Apply 152 only to the pair/decoded estimator from which it was justified, or make one-shot raw legs diagnostic.
CNSI-02.required_regression: Replay V3 and predecessor evidence to prove each hard gate uses the same statistical object as its calibration; inject shared-NB excursions.

CNSI-03.cited_source_file_function_line: gain_covariant_confirmation_public.py:339 build_schedule; gain_covariant_confirmation_runtime.c:881 rows_form_pair; gain_covariant_confirmation_runtime.c:995 receiver_run_schedule
CNSI-03.mechanism: mapping_order is generated and parsed but never consumed; runtime pulls later mapping mates forward, making physical execution order differ from randomized row order.
CNSI-03.consequence: Thermal/mapping order is not prospectively blocked per replicate.
CNSI-03.minimal_repair: Freeze an explicit pair-level schedule with coherent mapping-first field, balanced thermal blocks, and exact pair execution.
CNSI-03.required_regression: Reconstruct execution from stage receipts and require exact equality to the frozen pair sequence and declared balance.

NSA-01.mechanism: Group IDs expose condition index and run IDs are reproducible from the public seed; receiver-loaded module publishes condition table, phase sequences, q_theta formulas, and private source map builder.
NSA-01.consequence: Receiver-visible code and public schedule can reconstruct condition/q_theta and declare ideal logical/physical responses without PMU measurement.
NSA-01.minimal_repair: Move condition/formula/map-building code out of receiver artifact and replace public-seed-derived identifiers with independently random private assignments.
NSA-01.required_regression: An attacker with deployed receiver image and public schedule must be unable to map opaque IDs to conditions; private labels, phase tables, q_theta, and map builders must be absent.

NSA-02.mechanism: Receiver subprocess runs target script from private-bearing source directory under same UID; deny checks are relative to temp CWD and do not enforce filesystem capability boundary.
NSA-02.consequence: Receiver can potentially read map or receipts and fabricate receipt-coherent ideal features before freeze.
NSA-02.minimal_repair: Use a separate receiver-only executable under distinct unprivileged UID and enforced mount namespace/chroot or equivalent.
NSA-02.required_regression: Actual deployed receiver process must fail to open module-directory map, sibling source receipts, private argv/proc paths, and private symbols.

NSA-03.mechanism: Adjudication never enforces exact feature-row coverage or row identity equality to the public schedule; replicate laws iterate only present keys.
NSA-03.consequence: A missing replicate-1 feature set can still produce ORBITSTATE_GAIN_COVARIANT_CONFIRMATION_CONFIRMED.
NSA-03.minimal_repair: Require exactly 144 unique feature rows, exact schedule identity fields, both replicates, all groups, phases, and mappings before decoding; iterate explicit REPLICATES.
NSA-03.required_regression: Omit replicate 1, omit a phase cell, duplicate a run ID, or relabel replicate/phase/mapping and assert hard rejection before classification.

GC-CUST-01.mechanism: Target validates manifest, schedule, and private map but records actual source hashes/bundle without comparing them with frozen manifest.
GC-CUST-01.consequence: Altered or TOCTOU-modified code can compile, execute, and classify successfully, invalidating executed-source custody.
GC-CUST-01.minimal_repair: Before compilation, require exact source-file key/hash/size equality and reconstructed-bundle equality against manifest; compile from immutable snapshot and rehash.
GC-CUST-01.required_regression: Mutate every transferred file before compilation and mutate runtime C between initial hashing and compilation; both must fail before PMU access.

GC-EVID-02.cited_source_file_function_line: run_gain_covariant_confirmation_v1.py:552 verify_copyback_manifest; run_gain_covariant_confirmation_v1.py:581-603 verify_success_evidence; run_gain_covariant_confirmation_v1.py:1291-1292 execute_authorized; gain_covariant_confirmation_target.py:55 unused success allowlist
GC-EVID-02.mechanism: An internally consistent packet containing only final result, execution manifest, and copyback manifest can be accepted as success.
GC-EVID-02.consequence: Remote evidence could be cleaned after incomplete local evidence acceptance, harming evidence integrity.
GC-EVID-02.minimal_repair: Enforce exact required evidence set and hash-key set, validate record counts and cross-file identities, and put controller metadata outside copied-output namespace.
GC-EVID-02.required_regression: Reject demonstrated three-file packet and every single-file omission; verify completed local evidence tree again after controller-result persistence.

GC-POLICY-03.mechanism: Unreadable policy fields become None; two all-None snapshots compare equal.
GC-POLICY-03.consequence: Exact CPU-policy restoration is not established.
GC-POLICY-03.minimal_repair: Hard-fail unless driver, governor, min, and max frequency are readable and structurally valid for both cores before comparing values.
GC-POLICY-03.required_regression: Missing, unreadable, empty, malformed, or partially populated policy fields must fail before hardware execution and at final custody.

GC-TIME-04.cited_source_file_function_line: run_gain_covariant_confirmation_v1.py:34 timeout constants; run_gain_covariant_confirmation_v1.py:724-739 remote wrapper; gain_covariant_confirmation_target.py:1274 replicate loop
GC-TIME-04.mechanism: Outer target timeout is shorter than combined valid inner replicate and subprocess budgets.
GC-TIME-04.consequence: GNU timeout can terminate Python before exception handler seals failure evidence, consuming hardware execution with partial packet.
GC-TIME-04.minimal_repair: Use coordinated deadline whose outer timeout exceeds every sealable path plus cleanup margin, or shorten inner budgets and install signal-safe failure sealing.
GC-TIME-04.required_regression: Delayed first replicate followed by second-replicate timeout must produce valid copyable failure packet before any outer timeout fires.

GC-CLASS-05.cited_source_file_function_line: gain_covariant_confirmation_target.py:995 adjudicate_frozen_main; gain_covariant_confirmation_target.py:1316-1347 execute_live; gain_covariant_confirmation_target.py:1127-1195 seal_failure_evidence; run_gain_covariant_confirmation_v1.py:613 failure verification
GC-CLASS-05.mechanism: Adjudication writes and returns result_class before final process scan, policy comparison, and temperature gate.
GC-CLASS-05.consequence: CONFIRMED can remain in adjudication artifact even when final custody later fails.
GC-CLASS-05.minimal_repair: Keep adjudication output unclassified until final custody gates pass; classify as last atomic step and detect contradictory packets.
GC-CLASS-05.required_regression: Inject failure into final process, policy, and temperature gates; no artifact may contain result_class, and controller must reject contradictory packets.

ICA-01.mechanism: Private records disclose d/fold/phase/response/polarity to source; source computes scalar q_theta and writes 2048+q versus 2048-q stores.
ICA-01.consequence: Perfect result confirms controlled source-to-PMU transduction, not unresolved OrbitState coupling or private relational accessor.
ICA-01.minimal_repair: Rescope package as transducer confirmation or freeze successor where unresolved pair remains one object and branch/phase/sign cannot control source workload.
ICA-01.required_regression: Label swap must be null; relation mutation must be predicted with sender workload traces invariant; carrier-off and geometry-null must kill effect; scalar replay from receipts must not reconstruct claimed invariant.

ICA-02.mechanism: Pre/post sentinels record only cycle values while pass/fail checks compare byte digests and booleans; no frozen PMU carrier restoration metric is adjudicated.
ICA-02.consequence: At most byte/hash return and deterministic re-preparation are established, not physical carrier restoration or catalytic closure.
ICA-02.minimal_repair: Predeclare R2+ physical equivalence metric and tolerance using independent carrier observables, and gate every replicate on it.
ICA-02.required_regression: Matching bytes with perturbed post-restoration carrier sentinel must block confirmation; no-restoration, wrong-inverse, and reordered-restoration controls must fail.

ICA-03.mechanism: Two replicates use one seed, device, route, schedule, and live session; promotion list omits explicit Small Wall acceptance properties.
ICA-03.consequence: A perfect result satisfies narrow confirmation rule but not substantive Small Wall acceptance law or reusable primitive claim.
ICA-03.minimal_repair: Add separate promotion evaluator requiring every Small Wall acceptance property plus multi-seed/session evidence and independent reproduction.
ICA-03.required_regression: Perfect two-replicate result must remain SMALL_WALL_CROSSED_NOT_PROMOTED; omission of any crossing property must prevent promotion.

ICA-04.mechanism: Target writes scientific CONFIRMED class before copy-back verification, cleanup, and remote-root absence verification.
ICA-04.consequence: Custody-invalid target confirmation can exist despite contract requiring all custody gates before final confirmation.
ICA-04.minimal_repair: Make target result provisional; only controller/post-run promoter may seal CONFIRMED after verified copy-back, cleanup, source reconstruction, and audit.
ICA-04.required_regression: Confirmed target payloads combined with copy-back failure, SHA mismatch, cleanup failure, or absence failure must produce no authoritative scientific class.
